languages.text: {n}Лицо Эоганна кривится, словно от приступа сильнейшей боли.{/n} "Я... Нет. Не готов. Это очень сильный, хотя и весьма подлый аргумент с вашей стороны, {name}. Похвально! Хорошо, я пойду на этот обман — но исключительно ради Нунциуса".

{n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо Эоганна кривится, словно от приступа сильнейшей боли.{/n} "Я... Нет. Не готов. Это очень сильный, хотя и весьма подлый аргумент с вашей стороны, {name}. Похвально! Хорошо, я пойду на этот обман — но исключительно ради Нунциуса".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn's face twists as if seized by an attack of intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I am not ready. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I shall go through with this deception, but solely for the sake of Nuncius."

{n}Eogunn's face twists as if seized by an attack of intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I am not ready. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I shall go through with this deception, but solely for the sake of Nuncius."

{n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I am not ready. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I shall go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

{n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I am not ready. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I shall go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

{n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

{n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn verzieht sein Gesicht, als hätte er heftige Schmerzen.{/n} "Ich ... Nein, das kann ich nicht. Das ist ein starkes, wenn auch niederträchtiges Argument, das Ihr da vorbringt, {name}. Lobenswert! Also schön, ich lasse mich auf diese Täuschung ein, allerdings nur für Nuncius."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn verzieht sein Gesicht, als hätte er heftige Schmerzen.{/n} "Ich ... Nein, das kann ich nicht. Das ist ein starkes, wenn auch niederträchtiges Argument, das Ihr da vorbringt, {name}. Lobenswert! Also schön, ich lasse mich auf diese Täuschung ein, allerdings nur für Nuncius."

languages.text: {n}Le visage d'Eogunn se déforme, comme s'il venait d'être frappé au visage.{/n} « Je... Non, c'est impossible, Bien qu'il soit sordide, cet argument est excellent, {name}. Bravo ! Très bien, j'accepte de me livrer à ce subterfuge. Mais uniquement pour le bien de Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage d'Eogunn se déforme, comme s'il venait d'être frappé au visage.{/n} « Je... Non, c'est impossible, Bien qu'il soit sordide, cet argument est excellent, {name}. Bravo ! Très bien, j'accepte de me livrer à ce subterfuge. Mais uniquement pour le bien de Nuncius. »

languages.text: {n}La cara de Eogunn se retuerce, como si sintiera un gran dolor.{/n} «Yo... No. No puedo. Es un argumento persuasivo, aunque rastrero, por su parte, {name}. ¡Encomiable! De acuerdo, participaré en este engaño, aunque solo sea por el bien de Nuncius».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: {n}La cara de Eogunn se retuerce, como si sintiera un gran dolor.{/n} «Yo... No. No puedo. Es un argumento persuasivo, aunque rastrero, por su parte, {name}. ¡Encomiable! De acuerdo, participaré en este engaño, aunque solo sea por el bien de Nuncius».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, sanki şiddetli bir acı içindeymiş gibi yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "Ben... Hayır. Yapamam Bu size yakışmıyor olsa da güçlü bir argüman. Övgüye değer! Pekâlâ, bu aldatmacayı sonuna kadar götüreceğim ama sadece Nuncius'un hatırı için."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, sanki şiddetli bir acı içindeymiş gibi yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "Ben... Hayır. Yapamam Bu size yakışmıyor olsa da güçlü bir argüman. Övgüye değer! Pekâlâ, bu aldatmacayı sonuna kadar götüreceğim ama sadece Nuncius'un hatırı için."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的脸猛然皱成一团，像是被剧痛攫住。{/n}“我……不。我做不到。您这番话固然卑劣，却也十分有力，值得称道！很好，我就把这场骗局演到底，这都是为了努恩修斯。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的脸猛然皱成一团，像是被剧痛攫住。{/n}“我……不。我做不到。您这番话固然卑劣，却也十分有力，值得称道！很好，我就把这场骗局演到底，这都是为了努恩修斯。”

languages.text: {n}エオガンは、激痛に襲われたかのように顔をゆがめる。{/n}「私は……いや。できません。それは、きわめて卑劣ではありますが、強力な論拠です、{name}。見事です！ よろしい、私はこの欺瞞をやり遂げましょう。ただし、ひとえにヌンキウスのためにです」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn screws up his face as if seized by intense pain.{/n} "I... No. I cannot. That is a powerful, if utterly sordid, argument on your part, {name}. Commendable! Very well, I will go through with this deception, but solely for Nuncius's sake."
